title: Phase 2: Runner and CLI tests
description: Write or update tests for runner.py and cli.py config integration. Verify command construction uses config values, per-agent-type tool resolution, backend resolution order, and backward compatibility when config is not passed.
acceptance_criteria: Tests verify CodexAgentRunner builds cmd from config backend binary and flags
Tests verify ClaudeCodeAgentRunner resolves per-agent-type allowed tools
Tests verify backward compatibility when config not passed to constructor
Tests verify backend resolution order (flag > env > config default)
All tests pass with uv run python -m unittest discover -s tests -v
